title: anthoxanthum glabrum
intro: Anthoxanthum glabrum, also known as smooth oat grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the temperate regions of Asia and Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum glabrum include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting immune system function. The herbal preparations of Anthoxanthum glabrum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
